categories.name: Sales channels
categories.description: Sell on social media, marketplaces, and more

onlineStoreFeatures.name: 99.9% uptime infrastructure
onlineStoreFeatures.description: 300 points of presence worldwide for reliable performance.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Best-in-class checkout
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Converts 15% better on average than other commerce platforms.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Built-in AI tools
onlineStoreFeatures.description: AI for launching, managing, and scaling every part of your business.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: 800+ themes
onlineStoreFeatures.description: AI-generated store design or pick from 800+ proven themes.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Headless commerce (Hydrogen)
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Build custom with Hydrogen or any stack using Shopify APIs.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Metaobjects & metafields
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Add custom pages, structured content, and specialized product info.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Drag-and-drop editor
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Effortlessly add pages and switch up layout.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Search and filtering
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Help customers find exactly what they're looking for.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Multi-language & currency
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Let customers select country and currency for shopping.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Product recommendations
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Encourage customers to fill their carts with AI recommendations.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Mobile-ready responsive
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Everything designed responsively for any device.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Audience targeting
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Show different products/pricing to international and B2B customers.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Loyalty programs
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Points, rewards, and referrals to retain customers.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: Subscription management
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Maximize revenue with subscriptions, bundles & memberships.

onlineStoreFeatures.name: 24/7 chat support
onlineStoreFeatures.description: Live chat support for all merchant inquiries.

payments: All major card brands + digital wallets
Shop Pay Installments (4 payments or up to 12 months)

keyFeatures.name: AI-Powered Sidekick Pulse
keyFeatures.description: Real-time proactive business suggestions based on store performance and market trends. Builds apps, creates workflows, generates reports.

keyFeatures.name: Agentic Storefronts
keyFeatures.description: Products discoverable and purchasable inside ChatGPT, Copilot, and Perplexity. AI as a direct sales channel.

keyFeatures.name: SimGym App
keyFeatures.description: AI tool trained on billions of data points that simulates user behavior before store goes live.

keyFeatures.name: Theme A/B Testing
keyFeatures.description: Native A/B testing and scheduling directly in admin. Test different themes in real-time.

keyFeatures.name: Voice Chat & Wide-Mode Interface
keyFeatures.description: Natural voice interaction with Sidekick on desktop and mobile.

keyFeatures.name: Workflow Automation via Sidekick
keyFeatures.description: Describe what you want and Sidekick generates the logic inside Shopify Flow.

keyFeatures.name: POS Hub
keyFeatures.description: New central hardware system with stronger processing, stability. Uber Direct same-day delivery.

keyFeatures.name: In-store Subscriptions
keyFeatures.description: POS customers can now purchase subscriptions at physical locations.

keyFeatures.name: B2B Global Expansion
keyFeatures.description: Shopify Collective in 35+ countries, store credit, ACH payments, custom B2B terms.

keyFeatures.name: Shop Campaigns Multi-Channel
keyFeatures.description: Campaigns now on X (Twitter), Snapchat, Bing with conversion-based pricing.

keyFeatures.name: SMS Marketing (Shopify Messaging)
keyFeatures.description: Native SMS campaign creation, scheduling, and tracking.

keyFeatures.name: Shopify Functions (replace Scripts June 2026)
keyFeatures.description: Faster execution, more control, lower risk. Complete platform migration.

keyFeatures.name: New Theme Code Editor
keyFeatures.description: Autocomplete, multi-file view, diff tracking for developers.

keyFeatures.name: Catalog API & Checkout Kit
keyFeatures.description: Build and test agents that operate inside AI conversations.

keyFeatures.name: Dynamic Bundles
keyFeatures.description: More flexible bundle logic for upselling combos and value packs.

keyFeatures.name: Custom Checkout Per Market
keyFeatures.description: Personalized checkout for B2B and international customers.

keyFeatures.name: Auto-Personalized Storefronts
keyFeatures.description: Dynamic recommendations and homepages adapting in real-time.

keyFeatures.name: Social Sign-In
keyFeatures.description: Customers can sign in with Google or Facebook accounts.

keyFeatures.name: Sell on WordPress
keyFeatures.description: New sales channel for selling on WordPress sites.

keyFeatures.name: Payment Requests Based on Fulfillment
keyFeatures.description: Collect payments per shipment for multi-shipment orders.

keyFeatures.name: Same-Day ACH Transfers
keyFeatures.description: Faster access to funds (US only).

keyFeatures.name: FedEx Pay-on-Scan Return Labels
keyFeatures.description: Available directly in admin panel.

keyFeatures.name: Heatmaps & Multi-Store Dashboards
keyFeatures.description: Advanced analytics for better decision-making.

keyFeatures.name: Unlimited Inventory History
keyFeatures.description: Complete inventory tracking over time.

keyFeatures.name: Reusable Sidekick Skills
keyFeatures.description: Save effective prompts as reusable skills, share with team.

keyFeatures.name: 2048 Product Variants
keyFeatures.description: Expanded from previous limit for complex product configurations.
